name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies #3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine pumpkin puree, sugar, oil, and egg until well mixed.
2. In another bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and milk until combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring continuously until just incorporated.
4. Mix in chocolate chips, vanilla extract, and nuts (if using).
5. Scoop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Cool completely before removing cookies from the pan.
3 dozen
